content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Reaper
description: Legendary Bandit class mod for Krieg the Psycho, part of the Digistruct Peak content. Built around Taste of Blood, Blood Overdrive, Blood Bath, Thrill of the Kill, Fuel the Fire. Greatly extends kill skill duration.
notes: Requires the Digistruct Peak Challenge DLC. Below-level-50 versions cannot be obtained legitimately. It has no optional prefixes.

special.description: At max level: extends kill skill duration by +99%, bringing the standard 7s timer to 13.9s. Also boosts skills: +5 Thrill of the Kill, +5 Fuel the Fire, +5 Blood Overdrive, +5 Blood Bath, +5 Taste of Blood.
special.title: This is gonna get ugly.
